title: Vacancy for Category Manager at BikeDekho Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at BikeDekho Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Category Manager looking for your next big career move? BikeDekho Advisory Limited in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!
